template_meta.label: Supply Chain Price Negotiation (default template)
template_meta.description: 2 opponent NPCs + 1 player ally. Edit all fields in the admin scenario editor.

title: Supply Chain Price Negotiation
description: You represent the buyer in a meeting room, negotiating price and delivery terms with the supplier CEO and legal counsel.
player_side_goal: Push unit price below 85 RMB, delivery within 30 days, and maintain a good working relationship
opponent_side_goal: Keep unit price at 88 RMB or above, secure favorable payment terms, and lock in an annual purchase framework agreement

characters.persona: Assertive but relationship-oriented; speaks directly and occasionally backs points with data
characters.responsibility: Defend the price floor and secure favorable payment terms

negotiation_agenda.target: Lock annual framework agreement for at least 100k units

private_state.opening_move: Open by confirming purchase volume before discussing price
redlines: Will not accept unit price below 82 RMB
Will not accept uncapped penalty clauses

characters.persona: Precise and detail-oriented; cautious when speaking
characters.responsibility: Review contract clauses and flag legal risks

private_state.hidden_clause_risk: Force majeure clause favors the supplier

negotiation_agenda.target: Cap liquidated damages at 5% of contract value
Late delivery penalty not to exceed 0.05% per day

private_state.opening_move: Wait until pricing is discussed, then raise contract terms

characters.persona: Data-driven, skilled at price pressure; your internal ally
characters.responsibility: Provide market benchmarks and support pricing strategy

dispatch_rules.name: Pricing topics
dispatch_rules.description: When the user mentions price, quotes, or cost, supplier CEO and procurement ally speak first

dispatch_rules.name: Contract terms
dispatch_rules.description: When the user mentions contracts or legal terms, legal counsel speaks first
